articles.title: AI Infrastructure Needs Operational Trust More Than Bigger Promises
articles.summary: The next useful wave of AI platforms will be judged by reliability, observability, data boundaries, and the ability to recover cleanly when agents make mistakes.

articles.title: Markets Are Pricing Systems, Not Headlines
articles.summary: For long-term readers, the useful question is not whether a headline is dramatic, but whether it changes liquidity, earnings durability, policy expectations, or risk appetite.
articles.imageAlt: Editorial illustration of market signals and capital flows
